subcodes.first_line: The tongue is bewildered what to utter, and the pen is perplexed what to inscribe - one who, though unschooled in the seminaries [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لسان متحیر که چه ذکر نماید و قلم متحیر که چه نگارد نفسیکه مدارس نرفته مباحث
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the power of words; of speech, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
